en: Ah, quick announcement for two of Greendale's finest.
Payday is postponed until next week, so this is my freestyle rap apology.
Well, I'm a peanut bar, and I'm here to say your checks will arrive on another day.
Another day, another dime, another rhyme, another dollar.
Another stuffed shirt with another white collar.
Criminals, Wall Street taking the pie, and all the black man gets is a plate of white lies.
Prisons recruiting them, police bees shooting them, rap artists looting them,
labels all diluting them. Barack Obama, he's scared of me,
because I don't swallow knowledge, and I spit it for free.
Let me clear my throat, ha, ha, ha. I don't know what that was. I don't.
I don't know what that was.
Don't step, don't step to me. I like coffee and water.
Don't step to me. Ah, damn it, I lost it.
